Package org.eventb.core.pog.state

Interface IMachineVariableTable

All Superinterfaces:
IPOGState, IState
All Known Implementing Classes:
MachineVariableTable
public interface IMachineVariableTable extends IPOGState
Protocol for accessing all variables of a machine.
Since:
1.0

    Method
    Description
    boolean
    contains(FreeIdentifier variable)
    Returns whether this variable table contains the specified variable.
    List<FreeIdentifier>
    getPreservedVariables()
    Returns the array of variables that were already present in the abstraction of this machine.
    List<FreeIdentifier>
    getVariables()
    Returns the array of all variables of this machine.

  • Method Details

    • contains

      boolean contains(FreeIdentifier variable) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Returns whether this variable table contains the specified variable.
      Parameters:
      variable - the variable whose presence is to be tested
      Returns:
      whether this variable table contains the specified variable
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if this state component is mutable

    • getVariables

      List<FreeIdentifier> getVariables() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Returns the array of all variables of this machine.
      Returns:
      the array of all variables of this machine
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if this state component is mutable

    • getPreservedVariables

      List<FreeIdentifier> getPreservedVariables() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Returns the array of variables that were already present in the abstraction of this machine.
      Returns:
      the array of variables that were already present in the abstraction of this machine
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if this state component is mutable
